title: vicia calcarata subsp. triflora
intro: Vicia calcarata subsp. triflora, also known as the Three-flowered Vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vicia calcarata subsp. triflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or dried and used in capsules or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
